not_live_disclaimer: Describes installation behaviour only; does not imply a live Marketplace listing.

plugin_only.label: Plugin subtree only
plugin_only.notes: If Cursor installs only .cursor-plugin/ without the monorepo, govai-local MCP cannot resolve mcp/govai_mcp_server.py, python/, or scripts/.

full_repository.label: Full AIGov repository checkout
full_repository.listing_requirement: Marketplace long description must state that MCP tools require opening the full repository as the Cursor workspace root.
